title: My Little Friend Herobrine
description: Want to add a chilling touch to your worlds? My Little Friend Herobrine will do the trick!
body:
#
#

READ BEFORE USING

This Resource Pack was specifically made for version 1.21.5. No tests have been carried out on later or earlier versions than the aforementioned. Compatibility for different versions may come in the near future. If you have any additional questions, need help with something specific, want to contact the creator, or just see sneakpeeks, you can join the Discord.

"My little friend Herobrine" or "MLF-Herobrine" (Abbreviated), is a resource pack that aims to add terror elements as an ambient in the game, which will accompany you on your adventures. The resource pack currently offers a variety of events that will occur randomly while you play, in addition to adding some modifications to the mobs. MLF-Herobrine does not add any type of "screamer," only events that can distract you or make you feel uncomfortable throughout your game.

Polytone, EMF, and ETF are necessary for the Resource Pack to function correctly.

Features
  • Mysterious Signs
  • Extinguished Torches
  • Herobrine Sightings (Walking)
  • Herobrine Sightings (Mining)
  • Herobrine Sightings (Music Disk)
  • Herobrine Sightings (Crafting Table)
  • Herobrine Sightings (Lurking)
  • Glimmering Eyes in the Darkness
  • Eerie Owl
  • Modified Pig Model (Herobrine's Pig)
  • Modified Cow Model (Herobrine's Cow)
  • Modified Sheep Model (Herobrine's Sheep)
  • Shadows on Tree Tops
  • Falling Shadows
  • Shadows Appearing Near Torches
  • Custom Paintings
  • New Minecraft Title
